message:
feat(tooling): add drop_unwrap_finder static analysis utility

New workspace-local tool that uses syn to parse Rust source files and
locate all .unwrap() call sites. This aids the ongoing effort to
eliminate panicking unwrap calls in favor of proper error handling
(Result propagation or explicit expect() with context).

Structure:
- Cargo.toml: depends on syn (full+fold+visit), proc-macro2, quote, walkdir
- src/main.rs: walks Rust source tree and reports unwrap call locations

Intended for developer/CI use to track unwrap elimination progress
across the asupersync codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
